notes: From (x10.4, y6.6), jump along the rockface onto the cliff, then [SPRINT] jump onto the lamp post closest to the water.

notes: In Bentbrancch Meadows, sit next to the NPC Margeria, north of the Aetheryte

notes: Group of tree west of the NPC Jospaire.

name: The Invisible City

name: Camp Bronze Lake

name: The Bannock

name: Quarrymill

notes: On ther corner pillar of building directly east of the Delivery Moogle. Walk up the stairs on the outside and jump onto the rails towards the northwest pillar.

name: Black Brush Station
